testcase.name: test_risk_assessment_long_horizon

failure.message: AssertionError: Risk assessment failed: Worker error: Network connection lost. assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_copilot_phase3.py:400: in test_risk_assessment_long_horizon assert response.status_code == 200, f"Risk assessment failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Risk assessment failed: Worker error: Network connection lost. E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_due_diligence

failure.message:
AssertionError: Due diligence failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_copilot_phase3.py:421: in test_due_diligence assert response.status_code == 200, f"Due diligence failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Due diligence failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_due_diligence_no_deal_size

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_ai_copilot_phase3.py:279: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
